title: Levi’s boosts its sales outlook, defying concerns about the impact of the Iran conflict
summary: Levi's raised its sales outlook despite concerns about the impact of Iran tensions, citing strong consumer demand for its new products. The clothing company also noted that the TV series "Love Story" has been helping drive sales.
content: The jeans maker says shoppers are snapping up its new gear — and it became the latest clothing company to say the TV series “Love Story” was helping sales.

zh.title: 李维斯提升销售前景，不受伊朗冲突担忧影响
zh.summary: 尽管对伊朗紧张局势影响的担忧，李维斯提升了销售前景，理由是其新产品获得强劲消费需求。该服装公司还指出，电视剧《爱情故事》一直在帮助推动销售。

title: Oil slides after Trump agrees to conditional two-week Iran ceasefire
summary: Trump announced a conditional two-week ceasefire with Iran just before his Tuesday evening ultimatum deadline. Oil prices declined following the announcement as market tensions eased.
content: Trump announced the deal not long before a deadline for a Tuesday evening ultimatum for Iran was reached.

zh.title: 特朗普同意有条件伊朗停火后油价下滑
zh.summary: 特朗普在周二晚间最后期限之前宣布了与伊朗的有条件两周停火。随着声明发布，市场紧张局势缓解，油价随之下跌。

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says 'AI shift' opens opportunities to invest in startups
summary: Google CEO Sundar Pichai stated that the AI industry shift is creating opportunities for investment in high-growth startups. Alphabet has invested in several highly-valued private companies including SpaceX, Anthropic, and Stripe.
content: Alphabet is in investor in some of the highest-valued private companies, including SpaceX, Anthropic and Stripe.

zh.title: 谷歌首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊表示"人工智能转变"为初创企业投资创造了机会
zh.summary: 谷歌首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊表示，人工智能产业转变正在为高增长初创企业的投资创造机会。Alphabet已投资包括SpaceX、Anthropic和Stripe在内的多家高估值私人公司。

title: Elon Musk seeks ouster of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman as part of lawsuit
summary: Elon Musk is pursuing legal action to remove OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman from their officer positions at the company. The move is part of an ongoing lawsuit between Musk and the AI company.
content: Elon Musk is seeking to have OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman removed from their roles as officers in the company as part of a lawsuit.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克寻求在诉讼中赶出OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克正在采取法律行动，要求将OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼和总裁格雷格·布罗克曼从公司职位上撤出。此举是马斯克与该人工智能公司之间正在进行的诉讼的一部分。

title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday in positive territory as investors became optimistic about a near-term resolution to Middle East conflict. The shift reflects growing market confidence following the Iran ceasefire announcement.
content: The S&P 500 slashed its losses and closed in positive territory Tuesday as investors grew optimistic about a near-term solution to conflict in the Middle East.

zh.title: 周三的重大股票新闻：下一个交易日可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 标普500指数周二收盘上涨，投资者对中东冲突的近期解决方案持乐观态度。在伊朗停火公告后，这一转变反映了市场信心的增长。

title: 15 stocks to put on your list to buy when the market recovers
summary: MarketWatch identified 15 stocks poised to outperform when the market rebounds, focusing on companies sensitive to changes in market liquidity. These stocks are positioned to benefit from improved market conditions.
content: These stocks are good bets to outperform. because they’re sensitive to changes in market liquidity.

zh.title: 市场复苏时购买的15只股票清单
zh.summary: MarketWatch确定了15只股票有望在市场反弹时跑赢大盘，重点关注对市场流动性变化敏感的公司。这些股票的地位使其能够从市场条件改善中获益。

title: The US refinery now processing Venezuelan oil
summary: Chevron is now importing 250,000 barrels of crude oil per day from Venezuela, marking a significant shift in U.S. energy sourcing. The development reflects changing geopolitical relations and energy market dynamics.
content: Chevron is now importing 250,000 barrels of crude per day from Venezuela.

zh.title: 美国炼油厂现已处理委内瑞拉石油
zh.summary: 雪佛龙公司现在每天从委内瑞拉进口25万桶原油，标志着美国能源采购的重大转变。这一发展反映了地缘政治关系和能源市场动态的变化。

title: From TV deals to titles: Why the Big Ten’s money machine is just getting started
summary: The Big Ten conference's $7 billion television deal and expanded nationwide reach are propelling its dominance in college sports. The conference's financial resources position it for continued growth and influence.
content: A $7 billion TV deal and nationwide reach are fueling the Big Ten’s dominance in college sports.

zh.title: 从电视交易到冠军：为什么十大联盟的聚宝盆才刚刚开始
zh.summary: 十大联盟与价值70亿美元的电视协议和扩大的全国范围推动了其在大学体育中的主导地位。该联盟的财政资源为其持续增长和影响力奠定了基础。

title: Cramer says Tuesday’s stock market action gives investors a glimpse of the U.S. economy’s fate if Iran war persists
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer analyzed Tuesday's market action as an indicator of economic risks if the Iran conflict continues. He highlighted concerns about weak consumer spending combined with persistent inflation.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that the session showed "a heck of a lot of bad news," citing a "weak consumer, coupled with inflation."

zh.title: 克雷默称周二股市表现反映了伊朗战争持续下去美国经济的命运
zh.summary: 美国全国广播公司财经频道的吉姆·克雷默分析了周二的市场走势，作为伊朗冲突继续的经济风险指标。他强调了对消费者支出疲软加上持续通胀的担忧。

title: The Iran conflict isn’t panicking investors — yet. That’s about to change.
summary: While credit spreads remain stable and the S&P 500 has avoided correction, investors have not yet fully priced in potential risks from the ongoing Iran conflict. Market complacency may quickly reverse if the geopolitical situation deteriorates.
content: Credit spreads haven’t blown out, the oil-futures curve isn’t pointing to a lasting supply shock, and the S&P 500 has so far avoided a correction.

zh.title: 伊朗冲突还未让投资者恐慌——但这即将改变
zh.summary: 虽然信用利差保持稳定，标普500指数避免了调整，但投资者尚未充分计入伊朗冲突持续可能带来的风险。如果地缘政治局势恶化，市场的自满情绪可能会迅速逆转。

title: CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks shares pop as cybersecurity bulls finally get some AI validation
summary: Anthropic's announcement of a new cybersecurity coalition validates the AI potential of traditional security vendors, boosting shares for CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks. The partnership suggests AI companies see cybersecurity vendors as collaborators rather than competitors.
content: A new coalition announced by Anthropic suggests that the AI company is looking to partner with traditional cybersecurity vendors — not compete against them.

zh.title: CrowdStrike和Palo Alto Networks股价上涨，网络安全看好者终于获得AI认可
zh.summary: Anthropic宣布建立新的网络安全联盟，验证了传统安全供应商的AI潜力，提升了CrowdStrike和Palo Alto Networks的股价。该伙伴关系表明AI公司将网络安全厂商视为合作伙伴而非竞争对手。

title: Delta, Southwest raise checked bag fees $10 amid jet fuel price surge, joining other carriers
summary: Delta and Southwest are joining United and JetBlue in raising checked bag fees by $10 in response to surging jet fuel prices. Airlines are passing increased operational costs to passengers to offset fuel expenses.
content: Delta and Southwest are joining United and JetBlue in raising checked bag fees.

zh.title: Delta、西南航空在喷气燃料价格飙升之际将托运行李费提高10美元，加入其他航空公司行列
zh.summary: Delta和西南航空加入联合航空和捷蓝航空，应对喷气燃料价格飙升而提高托运行李费10美元。航空公司正在将增加的运营成本转嫁给乘客以抵消燃油费用。

title: Apple’s stock pares losses. Here’s how to think about the latest saga with foldable iPhones.
summary: Conflicting reports about the status of Apple's foldable iPhone development have created investor uncertainty regarding a device positioned as a major catalyst for growth. The conflicting signals highlight risks in betting on unreleased products.
content: Conflicting reports about the state of Apple’s next hot device have investors jittery over what’s been billed as a major catalyst for shares.

zh.title: 苹果股价跌幅收窄。以下是如何看待可折叠iPhone的最新风波
zh.summary: 关于苹果可折叠iPhone开发状况的相互矛盾的报告造成了投资者的不确定性，这款设备被定位为增长的主要催化剂。相互矛盾的信号突显了押注未发布产品的风险。

title: Levi Strauss revenue jumps again, with DTC making up more than half of sales for the first time
summary: Levi Strauss beat earnings estimates on both revenue and profit while raising its full-year guidance, bolstered by direct-to-consumer sales exceeding half of total revenue for the first time. The retailer's performance reflects strong demand despite economic uncertainties.
content: Levi Strauss beat estimates on the top and bottom lines and raised its guidance, which doesn't take into account President Donald Trump's latest tariff rates.

zh.title: Levi Strauss收入再次跳升，直销首次占销售总额超过一半
zh.summary: Levi Strauss在收入和利润上都超过了收益预期，同时提高了全年指导目标，直销销售首次超过总收入的一半。这家零售商的表现反映了尽管存在经济不确定性，但需求依然强劲。

title: USDA Secretary Brooke Rollins sent Easter email to staff touting 'Jesus' and 'God'
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth compared the rescue of a downed U.S. airman in Iran to the Christian resurrection narrative, drawing religious parallels to a military operation. The comparison sparked attention to the intersection of religious language and defense matters.
content: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Monday compared the rescue of a downed U.S. airman in Iran to the story of Jesus's resurrection.

zh.title: USDA国务卿布鲁克·罗林斯向员工发送复活节邮件，鼓吹"耶稣"和"上帝"
zh.summary: 国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将对一名在伊朗被击落的美国飞行员的救援比作基督教复活叙事，为军事行动中的宗教措辞进行了类比。这一比较引发了对宗教语言与国防事务交集的关注。

title: Indian migrant workers hit by cooking gas shortages are leaving cities
summary: Indian migrant workers are leaving major cities as the Iran war disrupts global cooking gas supplies, forcing them to struggle with access to essential resources. The shortage is disproportionately affecting lower-income workers dependent on cylinder gas.
content: Migrant workers say they are struggling to access cooking gas cylinders as the Iran war squeezes supplies.

zh.title: 遭遇烹饪气体短缺的印度移民工人正在离开城市
zh.summary: 由于伊朗战争扰乱了全球烹饪气体供应，印度移民工人正在离开主要城市，被迫为获取基本资源而奋力挣扎。短缺对依赖钢瓶气的低收入工人的影响尤为严重。

title: Anthropic limits Mythos AI rollout over fears hackers could use model for cyberattacks
summary: Anthropic is limiting the rollout of its Mythos AI model citing concerns that hackers could exploit it for cyberattacks, while simultaneously partnering with Microsoft, Amazon, Apple, CrowdStrike, and Palo Alto Networks through Project Glasswing. The restricted rollout balances innovation with responsible security practices.
content: Microsoft, Amazon, Apple, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks and others will use the model as part of a new cybersecurity initiative called Project Glasswing.

zh.title: Anthropic因担心黑客可能利用模型进行网络攻击而限制Mythos AI的推出
zh.summary: Anthropic以黑客可能利用该模型进行网络攻击的顾虑为由限制了其Mythos AI模型的推出，同时通过Project Glasswing与微软、亚马逊、苹果、CrowdStrike和Palo Alto Networks建立合作伙伴关系。受限制的推出在创新与负责任的安全实践之间取得了平衡。

title: AWS teams working around the clock to keep Middle East services up after drone strikes, CEO says
summary: Amazon's Middle East data centers have been affected by the Iran war, requiring round-the-clock effort to maintain cloud services availability, according to cloud chief Matt Garman. This highlights the vulnerability of critical infrastructure to geopolitical conflicts.
content: The Iran war has hit Amazon data centers in the region, and the company is working around the clock on availability, cloud chief Matt Garman said.

zh.title: AWS团队在无人机袭击后夜以继日保持中东服务运行，CEO表示
zh.summary: 根据云计算负责人Matt Garman所说，亚马逊位于中东的数据中心受到伊朗战争的影响，需要夜以继日的努力来维持云服务的可用性。这突显了关键基础设施对地缘政治冲突的脆弱性。

title: Trump praises Hungary PM Viktor Orban after Vance calls him at Budapest rally
summary: Vice President JD Vance called Hungary's PM Viktor Orbán at a Budapest rally, praising him and encouraging voters to support him. The endorsement reflects deepening ties between the Trump administration and Hungary's government.
content: Vance said he was not there to tell Hungarians how to vote, but later told them to "go to the polls" and "stand with Viktor Orbán, because he stands for you."

zh.title: 特朗普在范斯在布达佩斯集会上给他打电话后称赞匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班
zh.summary: 副总统JD范斯在布达佩斯集会上给匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班打电话，称赞他并鼓励选民支持他。这种认可反映了特朗普政府与匈牙利政府之间日益深化的关系。

title: Energy has soared since the Iran war began. These traders are now cautious
summary: Energy stocks have surged approximately 34% in 2026 following the outbreak of the Iran war, but market analysts on CNBC express doubt about the sustainability of this rally. The skepticism reflects concerns about potential market corrections.
content: The energy sector has surged around 34% in 2026, but investors on CNBC’s “Halftime Report” expressed skepticism that the rally can last.

zh.title: 自伊朗战争开始以来能源价格飙升。这些交易员现在很谨慎
zh.summary: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，2026年能源股上涨了约34%，但CNBC上的市场分析师对这次涨幅的可持续性表示怀疑。这种怀疑反映了人们对潜在市场调整的担忧。

title: NASA Artemis II photo captures moon eclipse of sun — 'Absolutely stunning'
summary: NASA's Artemis II mission has broken the record for the farthest distance humans have traveled from Earth and captured a stunning photo of a lunar eclipse of the sun. The successful mission sets the stage for future manned lunar landings.
content: Artemis II is returning home after breaking the record for the farthest distance traveled by humans from Earth and setting the stage for a manned lunar landing.

zh.title: NASA阿尔忒弥斯二号拍摄月球日食照片——"绝对令人惊艳"
zh.summary: NASA的阿尔忒弥斯二号任务创造了人类从地球出发所能到达的最远距离记录，并拍摄了令人惊艳的月球日食照片。成功的任务为未来的载人月球登陆奠定了基础。

title: Stocks fall as Trump’s Tuesday night deadline for Iran looms: ‘The market is certainly on edge’
summary: U.S. stocks declined as President Trump intensified threats to compel Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz by end of Tuesday, with the S&P 500 remaining positive for April despite market uncertainty. The geopolitical tensions are creating significant stock market volatility.
content: U.S. stocks were lower Tuesday — but with the S&P 500 still positive in April — as President Donald Trump intensified his threats against Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz by this evening.

zh.title: 随着特朗普周二晚间伊朗截止期限临近，股市下跌："市场肯定在紧张中"
zh.summary: 美国股票因特朗普总统加强威胁要求伊朗在周二截止前重新开放霍尔木兹海峡而下跌，标普500指数尽管存在市场不确定性但在4月份仍保持正值。地缘政治紧张局势正在造成股市大幅波动。

title: 41-year-old high school teacher's side hustle brings in $3.8 million a year—he shares 'every high and every low' with students
summary: Kevin Corey, a high school business teacher in New York, generates $3.8 million annually from his flushable wipes brand Stall Mates while teaching students about entrepreneurship. His success demonstrates how educators can leverage business ventures while mentoring the next generation.
content: Kevin Corey, a high school business teacher in New York, shares real-life lessons with students — including from Stall Mates, his own flushable wipes brand.

zh.title: 41岁高中教师的副业年收入380万美元——他与学生分享"每个高峰和低谷"
zh.summary: 纽约高中商业教师凯文·科里通过其可冲洗湿巾品牌Stall Mates每年创造380万美元收入，同时向学生传授创业知识。他的成功证明了教育工作者如何在指导下一代的同时利用商业风险。

title: With gas prices above $4, drivers across the country grapple with higher costs: “I have to spend it—there’s no other way”
summary: Gas prices have risen above $4 per gallon, forcing drivers nationwide to reduce driving, cancel trips, and adjust household budgets. The price increase reflects broader economic pressures affecting consumer spending and mobility.
content: From New York to Los Angeles, drivers say they’re driving less, skipping trips and adjusting budgets as gas prices rise.

zh.title: 汽油价格超过4美元，全国驾驶员为高成本苦恼："我必须花钱——别无选择"
zh.summary: 汽油价格升至每加仑4美元以上，迫使全国驾驶员减少驾驶、取消出行并调整家庭预算。价格上涨反映了影响消费支出和出行流动性的更广泛经济压力。

title: Here’s the real reason these 3 airlines are raising their bag fees
summary: Three major airlines have increased their checked-bag fees this month, adding to the financial burden travelers already face from long security lines and rising airfare costs. The fee increases demonstrate airlines' strategy to offset operational costs.
content: Three major airlines have hiked their checked-bag fees this month, in another blow for travelers still reeling from long TSA lines and increased airfare.

zh.title: 这是3家航空公司提高行李费的真实原因
zh.summary: 三家主要航空公司本月提高了行李费，加重了旅客已经面临的财务负担，包括安检排队和机票费用上升。费用上涨展示了航空公司抵消运营成本的策略。

title: Bill Gates interview about Jeffrey Epstein by House Oversight set for June 10
summary: The House Oversight Committee has scheduled an interview with Bill Gates for June 10 regarding his dealings with Jeffrey Epstein, and will also interview billionaire Ted Waitt on April 30. The interviews are part of ongoing congressional scrutiny of connections to the convicted financier.
content: The House Oversight Committee also will interview billionaire Ted Waitt about his dealings with Epstein on April 30.

zh.title: 众议院监督委员会定于6月10日对比尔·盖茨进行关于杰弗瑞·爱泼斯坦的采访
zh.summary: 众议院监督委员会定于6月10日对比尔·盖茨进行采访，涉及其与杰弗瑞·爱泼斯坦的交易，并将在4月30日采访亿万富翁泰德·瓦特。这些采访是国会对与这位被定罪金融家的联系进行持续审查的一部分。

title: Apple shares sink on report of foldable iPhone delays
summary: Apple shares dropped following reports that the company is facing engineering challenges that could delay the launch of its foldable iPhone beyond the anticipated 2026 release window. Development setbacks raise questions about Apple's ability to compete in the emerging foldable phone market.
content: The company is reportedly facing engineering challenges in the development of the foldable phones, which are anticipated to launch later this year.

zh.title: 苹果股价因可折叠iPhone延期报告而下跌
zh.summary: 苹果股价下跌，因为报告显示该公司面临工程挑战，可能导致其可折叠iPhone的发布延期超过预期的2026年发布窗口。开发挫折引发了关于苹果与新兴可折叠手机市场竞争能力的质疑。

title: National College Decision Day is approaching. How to maximize aid
summary: As National College Decision Day approaches, education experts provide guidance on selecting a school while considering financial aid packages. Choosing wisely with aid optimization can significantly reduce long-term education costs.
content: College experts share their best advice on how to choose a school, factoring in financial aid.

zh.title: 全国大学决策日临近。如何最大化财政援助
zh.summary: 随着全国大学决策日的临近，教育专家提供了在考虑财政援助方案的同时选择学校的指导。通过优化援助明智选择可以显著降低长期教育成本。

title: Iran war upends spring housing market. Here's what real estate agents are seeing
summary: Real estate agents report that home buyers in the first quarter prioritized concerns about the economy and mortgage rates over home prices as the Iran war creates market uncertainty. Geopolitical tensions are reshaping buyer priorities in the spring housing market.
content: Home buyers in the first quarter were more concerned about the economy and mortgage rates than they were about home prices, CNBC's Housing Market Survey found.

zh.title: 伊朗战争扰乱春季房地产市场。地产经纪人看到了什么
zh.summary: 地产经纪人报告称，随着伊朗战争造成市场不确定性，第一季度的购房者优先考虑经济和抵押贷款利率的担忧，而不是房价。地缘政治紧张局势正在重塑春季房地产市场中购房者的优先事项。

title: Strait of Hormuz blockage upends global helium supply. This U.S. company could benefit
summary: The blockage of the Strait of Hormuz has disrupted global helium supply chains, potentially benefiting certain U.S. companies like Exxon Mobil, which UBS believes has at least 5% upside remaining. The supply disruption creates both challenges and investment opportunities.
content: UBS thinks Exxon Mobil shares have at least another 5% left in them.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡封锁扰乱全球氦气供应。这家美国公司可能受益
zh.summary: 霍尔木兹海峡的封锁中断了全球氦气供应链，可能让埃克森美孚等美国企业受益，摩根士丹利认为其仍有至少5%的上升空间。供应中断既带来挑战也创造投资机会。

title: Americans would love this $25,000 hybrid SUV — but it’s not available here yet
summary: A Chinese $25,000 hybrid SUV has received positive reviews from automotive testers, suggesting that affordable foreign vehicles could appeal to American consumers if available. The lack of Chinese vehicle availability in the U.S. represents a missed opportunity for budget-conscious buyers.
content: Chinese vehicles may not be for sale in the U.S. yet, but they’re already getting positive reviews. “Other automakers should be paying attention,” said a vehicle-test editor at Edmunds.

zh.title: 美国人会喜欢这款2.5万美元的混合动力SUV——但目前在美国还买不到
zh.summary: 一款中国产2.5万美元的混合动力SUV获得了汽车测试人员的好评，表明如果可获得，平价外国车型可能会吸引美国消费者。中国车型在美国市场的缺失代表了对预算有限购买者的一个错失机遇。

title: ‘I paid the $10 entry fee’: A friend picked my March Madness bracket. Ethically, do I owe her half of my $150 winnings?
summary: A March Madness bracket winner questions whether they owe their friend a share of their $150 winnings when the friend paid the $10 entry fee and selected the bracket. The advice column explores the ethics of shared gambling entries and profit-sharing agreements.
content: “There was no real expectation of splitting the winnings.”

zh.title: "我支付了10美元的参赛费"：朋友为我选了疯狂三月赛事。道德上我是否应该分给她一半的150美元奖金？
zh.summary: 一位疯狂三月赛事获胜者质疑是否应该与朋友分享150美元奖金，因为朋友支付了10美元参赛费并选择了赛事组合。这个建议栏探讨了共享赌博参赛和利润分享协议的伦理问题。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Apple, Broadcom, Intel, Morgan Stanley, Oracle, Wingstop & more
summary: Wall Street's largest investment banks and analysts released major calls affecting stocks like Apple, Broadcom, and Intel. These analyst recommendations guide institutional investment decisions.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.

zh.title: 周二最重要的分析师评级：苹果、博通、英特尔、摩根士丹利、甲骨文、Wingstop及更多
zh.summary: 华尔街最大的投资银行和分析师发布了影响苹果、博通和英特尔等股票的重大评级。这些分析师建议指导机构投资决策。

title: Danone CEO flags price uncertainty as Iran war escalates: ‘Nobody knows' how conflict will play out
summary: Danone CEO expressed concerns that the escalating Iran conflict, now in its sixth week, threatens consumer goods pricing and operations. The uncertainty makes it difficult for companies to plan their cost structures ahead.
content: Consumer goods companies increasingly take stock of how the Iran war may impact their operations and costs base, as the conflict enters its sixth week.

zh.title: 达能首席执行官在伊朗战争升级之际警告价格不确定性："没人知道"冲突将如何发展
zh.summary: 达能首席执行官表示担忧，升级的伊朗冲突现已进入第六周，威胁到消费品定价和运营。这种不确定性使公司难以提前规划成本结构。

title: This struggling chicken chain is due for a bounce, Citi says
summary: Citigroup upgraded a struggling fast-food chicken chain from neutral to buy, signaling investor confidence in a potential recovery. The upgrade suggests the stock may be undervalued at current levels.
content: The bank upgraded the fast food chain to buy from neutral.

zh.title: 花旗表示，这家陷入困境的鸡肉连锁店即将反弹
zh.summary: 花旗集团将一家陷入困境的快餐鸡肉连锁店从中性评级上调至买入，表明投资者对潜在复苏充满信心。这次上调表明该股票在当前水平可能被低估。

title: U.S. oil prices top $115 a barrel after reports that Iran’s Kharg Island targeted with multiple strikes
summary: U.S. crude oil surged past $115 per barrel following reports of multiple military strikes on Iran's strategically critical Kharg Island. The escalation intensified concerns about Middle East supply disruption.
content: Oil prices were rising on Tuesday after reports that the U.S. conducted strikes on military targets on they key island.

zh.title: 美国油价在伊朗卡尔格岛遭多次打击报道后突破每桶115美元
zh.summary: 美国原油在伊朗战略性关键的卡尔格岛遭多次军事打击的报道后，价格飙升至每桶115美元以上。局势升级加剧了人们对中东供应中断的担忧。

title: House Democrats call on federal regulator to crack down on offshore prediction market war bets
summary: House Democrats are pushing federal regulators to oversee offshore prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket that have exploded in popularity for geopolitical betting. The platforms' growth has raised questions about proper regulatory frameworks.
content: Prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket have exploded in popularity recently, raising questions about how to properly regulate the platforms.

zh.title: 众议院民主党人呼吁联邦监管机构打击离岸预测市场战争赌注
zh.summary: 众议院民主党人正在推动联邦监管机构对Kalshi和Polymarket等离岸预测市场进行监管，这些平台因地缘政治博彩而爆发式增长。这些平台的增长引发了对适当监管框架的质疑。

title: IRA contributions hit new record, driven by Roth enthusiasm and Gen Z
summary: Americans set new IRA contribution records, driven largely by Gen Z's strong interest in Roth accounts for tax-advantaged savings. Savers have until April 15 to contribute to 2025 accounts.
content: There is still time to make IRA contributions for 2025. The deadline is April 15.

zh.title: 美国个人退休账户缴款创新高，由罗斯热情和Z世代推动
zh.summary: 美国人创造了新的个人退休账户缴款记录，主要受Z世代对罗斯账户税收优惠储蓄的浓厚兴趣推动。储户最晚可在4月15日前为2025账户缴款。

title: A generational buying opportunity has opened up for U.S. tech stocks, says Goldman Sachs
summary: Goldman Sachs strategists say U.S. tech stocks offer the best buying opportunity in decades as beaten-down valuations create entry points for long-term investors. This assessment reflects confidence in technology sector recovery.
content: Investors are now faced with the best opportunity in decades to buy beaten-down tech stocks, say Goldman Sachs strategists.

zh.title: 高盛称美国科技股迎来代际买入机会
zh.summary: 高盛策略师表示，由于估值遭受重创为长期投资者创造了切入点，美国科技股提供了几十年来最好的买入机会。这一评估反映了对科技行业复苏的信心。

title: JD Vance heads to Hungary to support Viktor Orbán ahead of high-stakes election
summary: U.S. Vice President JD Vance is visiting Hungary to support Prime Minister Viktor Orbán ahead of a high-stakes election where defeat appears likely. Orbán has positioned the EU as a greater threat than Russia to Hungary.
content: Viktor Orbán has said the EU is a greater threat to Hungary than Russia. As an election defeat looms, U.S. Vice President JD Vance is visiting to support him.

zh.title: 美国副总统JD·万斯前往匈牙利支持欧尔班参加高风险选举
zh.summary: 美国副总统JD·万斯正在访问匈牙利，在失败似乎很可能的高风险选举前支持总理维克托·欧尔班。欧尔班将欧盟定位为对匈牙利的威胁大于俄罗斯。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Broadcom, UnitedHealth, Casey's General Stores and more
summary: Broadcom, UnitedHealth, Casey's General Stores and other major stocks posted the largest moves in premarket trading. These price movements often signal investor sentiment ahead of the market open.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：博通、联合健康、凯西通用商店及更多
zh.summary: 博通、联合健康、凯西通用商店和其他主要股票在盘前交易中出现最大涨跌。这些价格波动通常预示着市场开盘前的投资者情绪。

title: U.S. assets and gold are being sold offshore as the world scrambles to afford higher oil prices
summary: Foreign countries are selling U.S. assets and gold reserves to finance the escalating cost of higher oil prices as the Iran war enters its sixth week. This capital flight reflects mounting global economic pressure from the conflict.
content: It’s six weeks into the Iran war, and foreign countries have begun selling U.S. assets and gold to afford the cost of higher oil prices.

zh.title: 世界争相应对高油价之际，美国资产和黄金被大量抛售
zh.summary: 随着伊朗战争进入第六周，外国正在出售美国资产和黄金储备以应对不断上升的油价成本。这种资本外流反映了该冲突对全球经济造成的日益加剧的压力。

title: Plan 2 student loan interest rates capped at 6% in England
summary: England is capping Plan 2 and postgraduate student loan interest rates at 6% amid risks of rising inflation. The measure aims to limit borrowers' repayment burden during economic uncertainty.
content: The cap on Plan 2 and postgraduate loan interest rates comes amid a risk of rising inflation.

zh.title: 英国Plan 2学生贷款利率上限定为6%
zh.summary: 面对通货膨胀风险上升，英国将Plan 2及研究生学生贷款利率上限设定为6%。该措施旨在经济不确定时期减轻借款人的还款负担。

title: The market, the Fed and the economy are ignoring war risks, says this strategist
summary: A market strategist warns that investors and policymakers are underestimating geopolitical risks from the Iran conflict and that the Federal Reserve will eventually raise rates despite denials. Ignoring these risks could expose markets to unexpected volatility.
content: The Fed will eventually have to lift interest rates, no matter the official denials, argues a strategist.

zh.title: 这位策略师表示，市场、美联储和经济正忽视战争风险
zh.summary: 一位市场策略师警告称，投资者和政策制定者正低估伊朗冲突带来的地缘政治风险，美联储最终将加息，尽管予以否认。忽视这些风险可能导致市场面临意外波动。

title: Novo Nordisk's explosive Wegovy pill launch draws a new wave of patients into GLP-1 weight loss treatment
summary: Novo Nordisk's new oral Wegovy formula is attracting a wave of new patients into GLP-1 weight loss treatment following its launch. Initial patient experiences with the pill form vary, suggesting diverse responses to the medication.
content: CNBC spoke with five U.S. patients who recently started the pill following its launch and have varying initial experiences with the drug.

zh.title: 诺和诺德Wegovy减肥药推出吸引大量患者使用GLP-1减肥治疗
zh.summary: 诺和诺德的新型口服Wegovy配方在推出后吸引了大波患者使用GLP-1减肥治疗。患者对药丸形式的初始体验差异很大,表明患者对该药物的反应存在多样性。

title: My second husband will leave me $540,000 if I bequeath him my $130,000 net worth. What will happen to my two sons?
summary: A financial columnist addresses an estate planning dilemma where a woman considers leaving her $130,000 net worth to her second husband who would bequeath her $540,000, raising questions about her two sons' inheritance. The column explores the financial and family implications of this arrangement.
content: “I doubt he would pass anything on to them.”

zh.title: 如果我将130,000美元的净资产留给第二任丈夫,他会留给我540,000美元。我的两个儿子会怎样?
zh.summary: 一位财务专栏作家讨论了一个遗产规划困境,其中一位妇女考虑将其130,000美元的净资产留给她的第二任丈夫,该丈夫会将540,000美元留给她,这引发了关于她两个儿子继承权的问题。该专栏探讨了这种安排的财务和家庭影响。

title: How the Iran war affects your money and bills
summary: The Iran war is driving up fuel, household energy, and food costs globally as oil supply concerns create inflationary pressure on consumer budgets. Understanding these direct impacts is essential for households managing expenses in the current environment.
content: The conflict in the Middle East has increased pressure on the cost of petrol, household energy bills and even food.

zh.title: 伊朗战争如何影响你的金钱和账单
zh.summary: 伊朗战争正在推高全球燃料、家庭能源和食品成本,因为石油供应关切对消费者预算造成通胀压力。理解这些直接影响对于在当前环境中管理开支的家庭至关重要。

title: Universal Music set for takeover by Bill Ackman's Pershing Square
summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square has launched a takeover bid for Universal Music Group, citing the company's undervalued stock price and addressable operational issues. The move signals investor confidence in the music industry's potential with proper management.
content: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square said Universal Music's stock price has "languished" due to a range of issues that can be addressed with the merger.

zh.title: 环球音乐集团即将被比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场收购
zh.summary: 比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场已向环球音乐集团发起收购要约，理由是该公司股价被低估且存在可解决的运营问题。此举表明投资者对在适当管理下音乐产业的潜力充满信心。

title: European stocks set to open higher as Iran war deadline unsettles markets
summary: European stock markets are expected to rise Tuesday as investors await President Trump's deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The market gains suggest investors are currently pricing in a negotiated resolution or limited geopolitical impact.
content: European stocks are set to rise on Tuesday as investors brace themselves ahead of President Trump's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 伊朗局势引发市场不安 欧洲股市有望高开
zh.summary: 欧洲股市预计周二上扬，投资者等待特朗普总统要求伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的期限。市场涨幅表明投资者目前预期会达成谈判解决或地缘政治影响有限。

title: Price of first class stamp rises to £1.80
summary: The UK's first class stamp price has increased to £1.80, marking another rise in postal costs amid Royal Mail's struggles with delivery targets. The price hike reflects both inflation and the postal service's financial pressures.
content: The rise come as the postal service faces criticism over missing delivery targets.

zh.title: 英国一等邮票价格上涨至1.80英镑
zh.summary: 英国一等邮票价格上涨至1.80英镑，这是在皇家邮政努力达成投递目标之际邮政成本的又一次上涨。这次涨价反映了通货膨胀和邮政服务的财务压力。

title: Oil prices extend gains as Trump reaffirms Tuesday deadline for bombarding Iran's power plants, bridges
summary: Crude oil prices continued climbing following President Trump's reaffirmation of his Tuesday deadline for military escalation against Iran's infrastructure. The repeated threats underscore investor concerns about potential disruptions to oil supplies through a critical shipping channel.
content: Crude prices extended gains after Trump repeated the Tuesday deadline for escalating attacks on Iran's power plants and bridges.

zh.title: 石油价格继续上涨，特朗普重申星期二对伊朗电力设施和桥梁的轰炸期限
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统重申其对伊朗基础设施进行军事升级的星期二期限后，原油价格继续攀升。反复的威胁突显了投资者对通过关键运输通道供应中断的担忧。

title: SpaceX lays out IPO details, targets early June roadshow: Reuters
summary: SpaceX plans to launch its initial public offering roadshow the week of June 8, with executives pitching to institutional investors. The early June timing positions the company's IPO among the year's most anticipated debuts.
content: The Elon Musk-led company plans to launch its roadshow the week of June 8, when executives and bankers will pitch the IPO to investors, sources said.

zh.title: SpaceX公布IPO细节，目标六月初路演：路透社
zh.summary: SpaceX计划在6月8日这周启动首次公开募股路演，高管向机构投资者进行推介。六月初的时间安排将该公司的IPO列为今年最令人期待的首次亮相之一。

title: Oil prices rise ahead of Trump's Iran deal deadline
summary: Oil prices are rising amid President Trump's ultimatum for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, backed by threats of military action. The dramatic rhetoric adds significant geopolitical risk premium to global crude markets.
content: The US president has threatened to take out Iran "in one night" if it does not agree to open the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普伊朗协议截止日期前油价上升
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统对伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的最后通牒中，油价正在上升，该通牒得到了军事行动威胁的支持。这种戏剧性的言辞为全球原油市场增加了重大的地缘政治风险溢价。

title: Alderney fuel duty relief proposed as prices rise
summary: An Alderney politician has proposed fuel duty relief as the island faces fuel prices 60% higher than the UK average. The price disparity reflects the territory's geographic isolation and dependence on imported fuel.
content: Politician recommends fuel duty relief, with Alderney's prices more than 60% higher than UK average.

zh.title: 奥尔德尼岛提议燃料税减免以应对油价上升
zh.summary: 一位奥尔德尼岛政治家提议燃料税减免，因为该岛面临比英国平均水平高60%的燃料价格。这种价格差异反映了该地区的地理隔离和对进口燃料的依赖。

title: Brazil puts China's BYD on list of shame for workers' past slavery-like conditions
summary: Brazil has blacklisted Chinese automaker BYD following a 2024 scandal involving human trafficking and exploitative labor conditions affecting Chinese workers. The action demonstrates growing enforcement of labor standards against major international corporations.
content: Brazil has blacklisted China's BYD, after a 2024 scandal in which Chinese workers were said to have been victims of human trafficking and abusive contracts.

zh.title: 巴西因工人过去的奴役式条件将中国比亚迪列入耻辱名单
zh.summary: 继2024年涉及人口贩运和对中国工人剥削性劳动条件的丑闻后，巴西将中国汽车制造商比亚迪列入黑名单。这一行动表明对主要国际公司劳动标准执法力度的加强。

title: Samsung shares rise after profit seen jumping 8-fold on AI chip boom
summary: Samsung Electronics shares surged after the company forecast record first-quarter operating profit driven by soaring demand for AI memory chips, far exceeding analyst expectations. The strong results reflect the technology industry's AI boom translating into robust semiconductor demand.
content: Samsung Electronics forecast record first-quarter operating profit that came in far above analyst estimates on booming demand for AI memory chips.

zh.title: 三星因AI芯片热潮利润预计增长8倍后股价上升
zh.summary: 三星电子股价在公司预测首季度创纪录营业利润后大幅上升，这是由AI存储芯片需求激增推动的，远超分析师预期。强劲的成绩反映了科技产业AI热潮转化为强劲的半导体需求。

title: India's high-growth economy gets a Middle East oil shock
summary: India's currency, stocks, and growth projections face pressure from a triple energy shock stemming from the Iran conflict and Middle East tensions. The disruption poses a significant headwind to the nation's previously strong economic growth trajectory.
content: India's currency, stocks and growth projections take a beating as the country faces a triple energy shock due to Iran war.

zh.title: 印度高增长经济面临中东油价冲击
zh.summary: 印度的货币、股票和增长预期面临来自伊朗冲突和中东局势的三重能源冲击。这一扰乱对该国以前强劲的经济增长轨迹构成了重大逆风。

title: Broadcom agrees to expanded chip deals with Google, Anthropic
summary: Broadcom will produce future versions of Google's AI chips and expanded its deal with Anthropic, demonstrating strong demand for specialized semiconductor manufacturing. This agreement underscores the critical importance of chip supply for scaling large language models. The deals position Broadcom as a major beneficiary of the AI boom.
content: Broadcom said it agreed to produce future versions of Google artificial intelligence chips, and announced an expanded deal with Anthropic.

zh.title: 博通与谷歌和Anthropic达成扩大芯片交易协议
zh.summary: 博通将生产谷歌未来版本的人工智能芯片，并扩大与Anthropic的交易，展示了对专业半导体制造的强劲需求。该协议强调了芯片供应对扩展大型语言模型的关键重要性。这些交易使博通成为人工智能热潮的主要受益者。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open higher as investors assess Trump's mixed messaging on Iran war
summary: Trump renewed threats against Iranian civilian infrastructure while signaling that Iranian leadership is negotiating, creating mixed signals for investors. Asia-Pacific markets rose as investors assessed the possibility of near-term conflict resolution. The 24-hour deadline adds urgency to ongoing diplomatic efforts.
content: Trump renewed threats on targeting Iran's civilian infrastructure if a peace deal is not reached in less than 24 hours, while signaling Iranian leadership is negotiating in earnest.

zh.title: 亚太市场上涨，投资者评估特朗普关于伊朗战争的混合信号
zh.summary: 特朗普更新了对伊朗民用基础设施的威胁，同时表示伊朗领导层正在谈判，为投资者制造了混合信号。亚太市场上涨，因为投资者评估了短期冲突解决的可能性。24小时期限为正在进行的外交努力增加了紧迫性。
